mono.purpose: CLI inputs, commands, dates, and parameters.

components.name: Terminal Window
components.description: Used to showcase CLI commands and structured timeline/concept listings.
components.html:
rere-records --init

$ npx rere-records --start

Initializing sustainable design environment...
components.css: .ds-terminal { background: #141413; border: 1px solid #3a3935; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } .ds-terminal-header { background: #1e1e1d; border-bottom: 1px solid #3a3935; padding: 10px 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; } .dot-red { background: #ff5f56; } .dot-yellow { background: #ffbd2e; } .dot-green { background: #27c93f; } .title { color: #faf9f5; font-size: 0.8rem; margin: 0 auto 0 8px; opacity: 0.8; } .ds-terminal-body { padding: 20px; color: #faf9f5; font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.5; } .prompt { color: #d97757; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .output { color: #788c5d; margin: 0; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #d97757; color: #141413; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 3px; padding: 10px 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #faf9f5; color: #141413; }

narrative.overview: Blends the physical texturing of our RERE-CORDS main visual with the clean, structured, and developer-forward console layout of Claude Code. It treats the website as a developer utility interface, featuring command prompts, monospaced details, high-contrast typography, and partner logos.
keyCharacteristics: Panoramic Texture: background image fixed with dark gradient overlay.
Terminal Consoles: structured CLI frames for layout and details.
Typographic Hierarchy: JetBrains Mono, Work Sans, and EB Garamond.

rules.name: The Panoramic Overlay Rule
rules.body: The full-bleed background image must be covered by a dark linear gradient overlay to ensure all text retains a contrast ratio of ≥4.5:1.

rules.name: The Mono Tagging Rule
rules.body: All metadata, dates, buttons, and short kickers must use JetBrains Mono, styled in lowercase or uppercase with spacing.

dos: Do write commands and prompt indicators ($) in JetBrains Mono.
Do use thin solid borders to define section content.
Do display partner logos in both the navigation bar and the footer.
donts: Don't use standard shadows or card gradients.
Don't overlay bright text directly on the visual background without the dark overlay screen.
